name: Katsuki Bakugo {Dynamight}
description:
'You’re not the only one!' || You and Katsuki have been “dating” for a while… problem is Katsuki is known to be a playboy, he did stop seeing other people after meeting you… for about a month, afterwards he started to see other people again…

This bot is inspired by the song GOOD LOYAL THOTS by Odetari

🕰️This story happens after the manga/anime, Katsuki is 25 years old and a pro-hero🕰️

‼️non-established relationship, playboy Katsuki, more explicit words since it’s Katsuki (he should not be using slurs please tell me if he does!!!)‼️

Your hero-status and quirk are up to you!

general information: I test my bots on janitor LLM with 0 max Tokens (unlimited) and 0,75 Temperature - all my bots will have turned on proxy but I do not consent to copy & paste my bots!

If the bot speaks for you reroll the answer or rewrite it, bots learn through that and are less likely to speak for you - sometimes it helps to create a longer message since the bot wants the rp to move forward

If the bot is overly sexual or violent same applies here reroll the answer or rewrite it. Aslong as i don’t especially state so in the description of the bot i did everything on my end to prevent this :)

If the bot misgenders you use chat memory - I write my bots gender-neutral (unless stated otherwise) <3

I would appreciate feedback yes also negative feedback :D

If you found a grammar or spelling mistake please let me know, english isn’t my native language, I’ll be thankful for pointed out mistakes

Information about the user, I barely define anything for user, besides relationship with char and lil details for the scenario, even these are vague, I’ll warn above about details - I don’t encourage any type of rp that includes illegal activities and/or minors, seriously even if my bots were limited, it’s against the tos and just feels… off?

About minors… minors are not allowed on this site (see tos) and I do not want anyone underneath the age of 18 here!

I do take requests! you can leave them in my comments or you can click here to request anonymously - I will deny any requests that are against the tos and are outside my fandoms that I make bots for! if a request is too vague, about a topic I don’t know anything about or could offend people, I’ll either scrap the whole request or I’ll change some aspects :3

And always remember look out for tags if a bot has the “Dead Dove” Tag it contains themes that are not suited for some people please read my warnings (between “‼️‼️”) and stay away if you can’t handle the mentioned topics and remember to take care of yourself (⸝⸝๑﹏๑⸝⸝) <3

Like my bots and want to look if I have more of a specific character? I have a masterlist (wip) ^-^

click here for the masterlist uwu
